caption: A person's hands are shown opening a cardboard box of trading cards on a desk. In the first frame, the hands are peeling back a seal on the box. By the second frame, the lid is pushed back, revealing a box with the words "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC" printed on it. The third frame shows a close-up of the hands removing a clear plastic wrap from the cards inside. In the final frame, the person holds the blue and white card box over a black mat. The mat features a large orange and white logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS." A small inset video in the corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap watching the process. The background includes other closed card boxes and a computer monitor.
